creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
The affected driver was acd(4), which has been replaced by ata_cam(4)+cd(4) in FreeBSD 9.x. So much has changed and 7.x has been EOLed for a few years, so follow up here might bear fruit, but will not be relevant to FreeBSD today.

Please open a new bug if this issue occurs with FreeBSD 9.x+. We'll likely need the PCI ID, and might need to add a quirk for the ata device to ata_cam(4).
